titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD55/275

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=532 status=live modified=2021-04-07 08:01:56.994662+00 | translation moa=533 status=live modified=2021-04-07 08:01:46.628849+00

span.cl: Omnibus sancte Matris Ecclesie filiis . tam presentibus quam futuris . Willelmus de Laundeles . salutem in domino .

Nouerit vniuersitas vestra .
me pro salute mea . vxoris mee . et omnium antecessorum . et successorum . meorum . dedisse . concessisse . et hac presenti carta mea confirmasse deo et ecclesie
beate Marie de Melros’ . et Monachis ibidem deo seruientibus . et in perpetuum seruituris . totam illam terram . in feodo de Hundun . que vocatur Brune
cnolleflat . per illas rectas diuisas . per quas dicti Monachi ipsam actenus tenuerunt . videlicet sicut inferior pars de Bruncnolleflat . ex parte ori
entali iacet immediate iuxta antiquam diuisam . de Hundun . et inde sursum usque ad inferius . warnalium . et inde extransuerso . uersus occiden
tem usque ad superius warnalium . et sic per condossum sicut aqua descendit in haufurlangburne . Totam hanc terram . et terram de Hundun . et
terram de Rascau . cum earum pertinenciis et diuisis . et quicquid infra diuisas earum continetur . sine aliquo retenemento dedi . concessi . et hac
presenti carta mea confirmaui . dictis Monachis . in perpetuum . adeo libere . quiete . et honorifice . sicut aliqua elemosina in regno Scocie . liberius
quiecius . et honorificencius tenetur uel possidetur . Et sicut dictas terras die collacionis huius instrumenti . plenius . et vtilius
sibi tenuerunt . Et ego . et heredes mei dictas terras cum pertinenciis suis prefatis Monachis contra omnes homines inperpetuum . waran
tizabimus . manutenebimus . ac defendemus . Nichil de predictis terris a prefatis monachis . exigendo  nisi tantum oracionum suffra
gia deuotarum .
In cuius rei testimonium . presenti carte sigillum meum apposui .

Hiis testibus dominis . Willelmo de Sumeruille
. . . Nicholao . . . irforde . militibus . Iohanne de Prendir . . . Ricardo de R . . . e . . . Waltero de Ridale . Willelmo . . .

p.cl: To all sons of Holy Mother Church, as well present as future, William of Landells sends greeting in the Lord.

Let all of you know me, for my own salvation, of my wife's, and of all my ancestors' and successors', to have given, granted, and by this my present charter to have made firm, to God and to the church of blessed Mary at Melrose, and to the monks in that place serving God and who in perpetuity will be serving God there, all the land in the feu of Hownam which is called 'Brunecnolleflat', by the correct boundaries by which the said monks hitherto have held it, viz. as the lower side of 'Bruncnolleflat' on the eastern side lies immediately next to the ancient boundary of Hownam, and from there upwards as far as the lower hill, and from there across towards the west as far as the upper hill, and so by the ridge as the water descends into 'Haufurlangburne'. All this land and the land of Hownam and the land of 'Rascau', with their pertinents and boundaries, and whatever is contained within their boundaries, without any withholding, I have given, granted and by this my present charter made firm to the said monks for ever, as freely, quitly, and honourably as any alms in the kingdom of Scotland is freely, quitly, and honourably held and possessed; and as they full and usefully held the said lands on the day of the handing-over of this instrument to them. And I and my heirs shall warrant, maintain, and defend the said lands with their pertinents to the said monks against all men for ever. Nothing from the said lands is to be exacted from the aforementioned monks, except only the suffrages of devout prayers.
In testimony of this matter, I have applied my seal to the present charter.
With these witnesses, William de Somerville ... Nicholas [of Rutherford], knights, John of Prender[guest], Richard de [Ryedale], Walter of Ryedale, William ...
